---
title: Le Roi Lion
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557460/roilion_20220310_nbnc3e.png
description: Comédie musicale le Roi Lion, théâtre Mogador, paris
categories: [urbansketch]
date: 2022/03/10
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557460/roilion_20220310_nbnc3e.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
